message:
test(cancel): verify cancel attribution chain depth limits and truncation

Add test proving that CancelAttributionConfig correctly bounds cause
chain depth during recursive cancel propagation through nested regions.

state.rs:
- cancel_request_respects_attribution_limits: create root → child →
  grandchild region hierarchy, set max_chain_depth=2, cancel root
  with deadline reason, assert child chain has depth=2 and is not
  truncated, grandchild chain has depth=2 with truncated=true and
  truncated_at_depth=Some(2)
- Import CancelAttributionConfig in test module

docs/runtime_state_contention_inventory.md (114 lines, new):
- Document RuntimeState struct field-level contention profile (bd-23kbc)
- Classify fields as HOT/Warm/Cold with synchronization notes
- Single Arc<Mutex<RuntimeState>> identified as current sync strategy

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
